title: Add admin password authentication

requirements.text: Create a backend method to set and verify an admin password using secure hashing

quotes: adding admin login authentication with a password

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores a hashed admin password
Backend provides a method to verify password on login attempts

requirements.text: Add admin login form on AdminPage with password input field

quotes: adding admin login authentication with a password

acceptanceCriteria: AdminPage displays a login form when user is not authenticated
Login form includes password input field and submit button
Form validates password is not empty before submission

requirements.text: Protect the product upload form and category management features behind admin authentication

quotes: so only I can upload products and edit categories no other user

acceptanceCriteria: Product upload form is only visible after successful admin login
Unauthenticated users see only the login form on AdminPage
Admin session persists across page refreshes
Authenticated admin can log out from the AdminPage
Logout clears admin session and returns to login form
Logout button is visible only when admin is authenticated

constraints: Do not change existing product upload or cart functionality
Maintain compatibility with existing Product and Cart data structures
nonGoals: Multi-user admin system with different permission levels
